description:
Implement a custom Wazuh correlation rule (ID 100050) in /var/ossec/etc/rules/local_rules.xml to detect 'Impossible Travel'. The rule must be a child of the SSH success rule (5715) and trigger a Level 12 alert when the same user logs in from different source IP addresses twice within a 60-second timeframe. Verify the implementation by simulating the attack using the following log entries in /var/log/auth.log:

Mar 10 10:00:00 server sshd[1234]: Accepted password for travel_exec from 192.168.1.100 port 22 ssh2
Mar 10
